prompts.prompt: Parse the llms.txt at code.claude.com/docs/llms.txt and list all sections
prompts.expected_behavior: Fetches the llms.txt file via WebFetch, parses it into sections, and lists section names with link counts

prompts.prompt: Crawl the Claude Code monitoring docs from llms.txt
prompts.expected_behavior: Fetches llms.txt, identifies monitoring-related URLs, then crawls each URL via WebFetch and stores content

prompts.prompt: Generate a Scrapy spider for crawling platform.claude.com docs
prompts.expected_behavior: Parses platform.claude.com/llms.txt, then runs generate-spider.py to create a Scrapy project with the discovered URLs

prompts.prompt: Index all critical-priority Anthropic docs from the knowledge index
prompts.expected_behavior: Uses the SDK's fetchAllKnowledge with priority filter, fetches critical docs via WebFetch, and builds a knowledge index
